data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of suspending grants without uninstalling the extension. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that demonstrate this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality but lacks specific evidence of its implementation, leading to a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the ability to suspend grants without uninstalling the extension.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to suspend grants.
